---
title: "CogDrisk Complete Case Analysis"
format: html
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE, message = FALSE, warnings = FALSE)
knitr::opts_knit$set(root.dir = here::here())
```

```{r setting}
library(ggpubr)
library(missForest)

source('workflow/scripts/config.R')
source(CRS_FN)
source(COGD_RECODE_FN)

clinical_raw <- readRDS(file.path(DATA_INTERMEDIATE_PATH, "PREVENTAD_clinical_raw.rds"))
lifestyle_raw <- readRDS(file.path(DATA_INTERMEDIATE_PATH, "PREVENTAD_lifestyle_raw.rds"))

dat_cogd_scored <- readRDS(file.path(DATA_INTERMEDIATE_PATH, "PREVENTAD_cogd_scored.rds"))
dat_cogd_imp_scored <- readRDS(file.path(DATA_INTERMEDIATE_PATH, "PREVENTAD_cogd_imp_scored.rds"))
dat_cogd_exer_imp_scored <- readRDS(file.path(DATA_INTERMEDIATE_PATH, "PREVENTAD_cogd_exercise1_imp_scored.rds"))
```


## Complete CogDrisk scores
```{r}
complete_cogd <- dat_cogd_scored %>%
  filter(complete_scores == TRUE)
```

## CogDrisk scores by number of factors used for calculation
```{r}
df <- dat_cogd_scored %>%
  select(CONP_ID, score, num_cogdrisk_vars, complete_scores) 

ggplot(df, aes(x=num_cogdrisk_vars)) +
  geom_bar(fill = "steelblue") +
  scale_x_continuous(labels=df$num_cogdrisk_vars, breaks=df$num_cogdrisk_vars) +
  geom_text(stat = "count",
            aes(label=after_stat(count)),
            vjust = -0.5)

completeness_summary <- df %>%
   group_by(num_cogdrisk_vars) %>%
   summarise(
     percent_cases = (n() / nrow(df)) * 100,
     min_score = min(score),
     mean_score = mean(score),
     max_score = max(score),
     sd_score = sd(score)
   )
completeness_summary

ggplot(complete_cogd, aes(x=score, y=as.factor(1))) +
  geom_violin() 
```


## Comparing missing data imputation techniques
```{r}
# Dataframe of all scores
df2 <- complete_cogd %>%
  select(CONP_ID, complete_score=score) %>%
  # Imputing all data
  left_join((dat_cogd_imp_scored %>%
               select(CONP_ID, imp_all_score=score)),
            by="CONP_ID") %>%
  # Imputing all lifestyle vars and first exercise activities
  left_join((dat_cogd_exer_imp_scored %>%
              select(CONP_ID, imp_exer_score=score)),
            by="CONP_ID")

# Pivot longer for ggplot  
df2_longer <- df2 %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = c(complete_score, imp_all_score, imp_exer_score),
    names_to = "method",
    values_to = "score_value"
  ) %>%
  mutate(method = recode(method,
                         "complete_score" = "original (complete cases)",
                         "imp_all_score" = "imputed (all data)",
                         "imp_exer_score" = "imputed (exer_act1)"))

# SD ratio and Wilcox tests
var_ratio1 <- sd(df2$imp_all_score) / sd(df2$complete_score, na.rm = TRUE)
var_ratio2 <- sd(df2$imp_exer_score) / sd(df2$complete_score, na.rm = TRUE)
wilcox.test(df2$complete_score, df2$imp_all_score)
wilcox.test(df2$complete_score, df2$imp_exer_score)

plot1 <- ggplot(df2_longer, aes(x=method, y=score_value, fill=method)) +
  geom_violin(alpha=0.7) +
  geom_boxplot(width=0.1, fill="white") +
  stat_compare_means(
    comparisons = list(c("imputed (all data)", "original (complete cases)"),
                       c("imputed (exer_act1)", "original (complete cases)")),
    method="wilcox.test",
    label.x=1.5
  ) +
  labs(subtitle=paste0("SD ratio (imputed (all) vs cogd) = ", round(var_ratio1, 3), 
                       "; SD ratio (imputed (exer_act1) vs cogd) = ", round(var_ratio2, 3))) +
  ggtitle("Comparing imputation techniques for CogDrisk against original complete cases")

plot1
# ggsave(plot1, filename = file.path(EDA_OUTPUT_PATH$figures, "CogD_imputation_comparison.png"))
```



### Scatterplots of CogDrisk vs BBM (at first visit)
```{r}
df3 <- data_cogd_scored %>%
  select(CONP_ID, score) %>%
  left_join((complete_cogd %>%
               select(CONP_ID, complete_score=score)),
            by="CONP_ID") %>%
  left_join((data_cogd_imp_scored %>%
               select(CONP_ID, imp_score=score)),
            by="CONP_ID") %>%
  left_join((PREVENTAD_dat$plasma_ptau217 %>%
               group_by(CONP_ID) %>%
               slice(1)), by="CONP_ID") %>%
  select(CONP_ID, score, complete_score, imp_score, ptau217_simoa_UGOT) %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = c(score, complete_score, imp_score),
    names_to = "method",
    values_to = "score_value"
  ) %>%
  mutate(method = recode(method,
                         "score" = "original",
                         "complete_score" = "original (complete cases)",
                         "imp_score" = "imputed"))

ggplot(df3, aes(x=score_value, y=ptau217_simoa_UGOT, color=method)) +
  geom_point() +
  facet_wrap(~method) +
  ggtitle("Scatterplot of CogDrisk scores vs ptau217 (at first visit)") +
  geom_smooth(method=lm)
  # geom_density_2d(aes(fill=..density..),z geom="raster")

ipms_bbm <- complete_cogd
  left_join((ipms_dataset %>%
              select(CONP_ID, Study_visit_label, ptau181_simoa_UGOT,
                     GFAP_simoa_4plex, AB_ratio_simoa_4plex) %>%
              group_by(CONP_ID) %>%
              slice(1)),
            by="CONP_ID")

ggplot(ipms_bbm, aes(x=score, y=ptau181_simoa_UGOT)) +
  geom_point(shape=1) +
  ggtitle("Scatterplot of CogDrisk score vs ptau181 (at first visit)") +
  geom_smooth(method="lm")

ggplot(ipms_bbm, aes(x=score, y=GFAP_simoa_4plex)) +
  geom_point(shape=1) +
  ggtitle("Scatterplot of CogDrisk score vs GFAP (at first visit)") +
  geom_smooth(method="lm")

ggplot(ipms_bbm, aes(x=score, y=AB_ratio_simoa_4plex)) +
  geom_point(shape=1) +
  ggtitle("Scatterplot of CogDrisk score vs AB ratio (at first visit)") +
  geom_smooth(method="lm")
```
